leadText: The Striped Bottle (Japanese: ストライプボトル Stripe Bottle) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Striped Bottle serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A striped bottle that's small, light, and even comes with a cup. The detachable strap makes it handy for walking around with.
